questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "I am really nervous because ___"
questions.answer: it is my first day at work.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "My parents are both doctors — ___"
Complete the sentence: "Look at that dog! It is ___"
questions.answer: the biggest one I have ever seen.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "You are late! The meeting ___"
questions.answer: is already in the second hour.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "We are not from here — ___"
questions.answer: we are actually from New Zealand.

questions.prompt: My brother _____ a teacher at a primary school.
I _____ not very good at maths, but I love English.
The children _____ really excited about the school trip.
It _____ a beautiful day today — the sun is shining.
Find the mistake: "She are a very good student."
questions.answer: 'She' takes 'is', not 'are': 'She is a very good student.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "They is from Japan."
Find the mistake: "I is happy today."
Find the mistake: "Is they your parents?"
Find the mistake: "He not is tired."
questions.answer: The negative puts 'not' after the verb: 'He is not tired.' or 'He isn't tired.'
I am a student and twenty years old.
They are not in the office.
